megaMenu.heading: Mega menu
megaMenu.text: Renders a basic mega menu with one parent item and one child link using the default link style.

with-descriptions.heading: With descriptions
with-descriptions.text: Renders parent items with a description field, which appears below the section heading separated by a coloured border.

with-icons.heading: With icons
with-icons.text: Renders parent and child items with icons displayed inline beside the label.

with-active-item.heading: With active item
with-active-item.text: Renders a menu with an active parent and child item, applying the is-current class to indicate the current page trail.

parent-type-button.heading: Parent type: button
parent-type-button.text: Renders parent items as filled buttons instead of plain links by setting parentType to button.

child-type-button.heading: Child type: button
child-type-button.text: Renders child items as inline flex buttons instead of a plain list by setting childType to button.

mobile.heading: Mobile visible
mobile.text: Renders the mega menu visible on mobile breakpoints by setting mobile to true.

secondary.heading: Secondary colour variant
secondary.text: Renders the mega menu with a secondary background colour using the c-megamenu--secondary modifier class.

primary.heading: Primary colour variant
primary.text: Renders the mega menu with a white background and primary-coloured headings using the c-megamenu--primary modifier class.

cover.heading: Cover (full height)
cover.text: Renders the mega menu at full viewport height using the c-megamenu--cover modifier class.

font-heading.heading: Heading font
font-heading.text: Renders parent item labels in the heading font family using the c-megamenu--font-heading modifier class.
